prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford Essex V6 (3.0L, engine code: **3000E**) with a custom billet crankshaft from **Crower** (stroked to 3.2L, 94mm stroke) and forged **JE Pistons** (10.5:1 compression) paired with **Manley H-beam connecting rods** for high-RPM reliability (redline set at 7,500 RPM via **MSD Digital 6AL ignition box**).

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a **TurboSmart 45mm wastegate** and **Precision Turbo 50mm blow-off valve**, feeding into a **custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping system** (fabricated by **Bell Auto Services**) and a **Spearco front-mount intercooler** (700hp core). Boost controlled via **AEM 30-4100 wideband controller** targeting 12 PSI on **VP Racing M5 fuel** (110 octane).

Suspension overhaul with **Bilstein Clubsport coilovers** (revalved for TVR’s unique double-wishbone front and trailing-arm rear geometry) paired with **Polyurethane bushings from SuperPro** (part #SPF1000K) and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars** (22mm front, 19mm rear). Braking upgraded to **AP Racing CP5550 calipers** (4-piston front, 2-piston rear) clamping **330mm slotted rotors** (from a **TVR Griffith 500**) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**.
estetica: Full **RML Group** carbon fiber widebody kit (Vixen-specific, extending fenders by 3" front/rear) with **custom aluminum rivet bonding** for structural rigidity, finished in **House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red** over a **PPG DBC base**.

Rear wing swap to a **TVR Tuscan Speed Six GT-spec rear spoiler** (carbon fiber, 3D-scanned for Vixen fitment) mounted on **custom aluminum pedestals** (fabricated by **RaceTech UK**) with **adjustable angle of attack** (0-15 degrees). Front splitter replaced with a **custom 5-layer carbon fiber unit** (from **AeroCatch**) featuring **integrated NACA ducts** for brake cooling.

Interior stripped and reupholstered in **Bridge of Weir leather** (custom quilted pattern) with **Alcantara headliner** and **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, suede). Roll cage fabricated by **Sparco** (8-point, TIG-welded chromoly) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** and **OMP HTE-R seats** (FIA-approved, carbon fiber shells). Gauges replaced with **Defi Advance BF series** (oil temp, boost, wideband) in a **custom aluminum dash panel** (CNC-machined by **DashSport UK**).
